title: Restrict Access to Secure Files with Tetragon

resources.title: Tetragon Tracing Policy Concepts
resources.evidence_quote: Fortunately, the documentation has us pretty well covered too. So if we go to concepts, tracing policy, we can now begin to dive in to what a tracing policy is composed of.

resources.title: Tetragon GitHub Examples
resources.evidence_quote: You can find us on github.com/psyllium/tetragon and then find the examples folder.

resources.title: di.net Linux Man Pages
resources.evidence_quote: You can look it up on the man page if you want or it is available on any good man page website like di.net.

resources.title: Sourcegraph Linux Kernel Search
resources.evidence_quote: You can use source graph to search the entire Linux code base.
